inputs.label: Perigee Altitude
inputs.businessContext: Altitude of the orbit's closest point to Earth above the surface.

businessContext_i18n.en: Altitude of the orbit's closest point to Earth above the surface.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yörüngenin Dünya'ya en yakın noktasının yüzeyden yüksekliği.

inputs.label: Apogee Altitude
inputs.businessContext: Altitude of the orbit's farthest point from Earth above the surface.

businessContext_i18n.en: Altitude of the orbit's farthest point from Earth above the surface.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yörüngenin Dünya'dan en uzak noktasının yüzeyden yüksekliği.

inputs.label: Earth Radius
inputs.businessContext: Mean radius of the Earth. Default is 6371 km.

businessContext_i18n.en: Mean radius of the Earth. Default is 6371 km.

inputs.label: Gravitational Parameter μ
inputs.businessContext: Standard gravitational parameter for Earth. μ = G*M.

businessContext_i18n.en: Standard gravitational parameter for Earth. μ = G*M.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Dünya için standart çekim parametresi. μ = G*M.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
